category_sources: source_facts.description says Name server daemon; official NLnet Labs docs describe NSD as an authoritative DNS name server.
display_name_sources: Official NLnet Labs documentation title is Name Server Daemon (NSD); source_facts.name is nsd.

repo_sources: Official NLnet Labs NSD pages link to Browse GitHub Repository; GitHub repository NLnetLabs/nsd describes the NSD authoritative DNS nameserver.
tags_sources: source_facts.description plus official NSD docs identify NSD as authoritative DNS name server software.
